title: Macro Operator Briefing - Week 20
author: Busy-Specialist7708
selftext:
Last week I turned my regime dashboard for week 19 into an image and posted it here.

The regime dashboard is actually the first layer, which is basically a top down analysis of previous week market behavior and event data. The second layer is the weekly report briefing, which is a more readable and less quantified version of the dashboard that includes upcoming events and looks also to technical levels, then decides the system state, trade permission and risk allowance.  

This image is the weekly report fo r this week, converted to an image
